'''Wartogg''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] trader who lived during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was [[Bounty/Legends|wanted]] [[Death/Legends|dead]] by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] for switching allegiances to [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla]]. Wartogg was killed, and the 1,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] bounty on his head was claimed, by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] during his search for the [[Bando Gora/Legends|Bando Gora]].
